channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Animal M-Stak Relaunches for 2026 with Updated Non-Hormonal Formula
item.description: Animal has reformulated its M-Stak supplement for 2026, replacing older botanical ingredients with PEAK ATP and other updated compounds in its non-hormonal muscle support stack.

item.title: PricePlow Podcast Episode 214: Inside NuCelium's Functional Mushroom Cultivation Operation
item.description: The PricePlow Podcast speaks with NuCelium co-founders about their functional mushroom cultivation company and what distinguishes their sourcing and production methods.

item.title: Gaspari Nutrition Reformulates SizeOn with Amino9, HMB, and 6 Grams of Creatine
item.description: Gaspari Nutrition has updated its long-running SizeOn intra-workout supplement with new ingredients including Amino9, HMB, and a 6-gram creatine dose per serving.

item.title: Roundhouse Provisions Honors Chuck Norris with Cognizin-Based Cognitive Health Supplement
item.description: Roundhouse Provisions has released a cognitive health supplement named in tribute to the late Chuck Norris, built around the branded nootropic ingredient Cognizin.

item.title: NNB Nutrition Introduces Plant Protein Line Designed for Clear Beverage Formats
item.description: NNB Nutrition has launched the Clean and Clear Series, a plant-based protein ingredient line formulated to meet growing retail demand for clear protein beverages.
